content:
{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":41649,"duration_api_ms":41512,"num_turns":10,"result":"根据分析，根因是：**前端组件在 IPC handlers 注册完成前就尝试调用 `kg:get-stats`**。

以下是完整的诊断和修复建议：

```json
{
  "rootCause": "前端 StatusPanel 组件在 useEffect 中同步调用 getStats()，但此时 IPC handlers 可能还未完成注册。主进程在 main.ts:132 调用 registerIpcHandlers()，而渲染进程可能在窗口 ready 之前就触发了调用。",
  "fix": {
    "description": "在 StatusPanel 中添加错误处理和重试机制",
    "code": "在 src/components/Console/StatusPanel.tsx 中修改 useEffect，添加 try-catch 和重试逻辑：",
    "before": "useEffect(() => {\n  void (async () => {\n    setStats(await getStats());\n    setBackends(await detectBackends());\n  })();\n  // ...\n}, [detectBackends, getStats]);",
    "after": "useEffect(() => {\n  let mounted = true;\n  void (async () => {\n    // 重试机制：等待 handler 注册\n    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n      try {\n        if (!mounted) return;\n        const result = await getStats();\n        if (mounted) setStats(result);\n        break;\n      } catch (e) {\n        if (i === 4) console.error('getStats failed:', e);\n        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100 * (i + 1)));\n      }\n    }\n    if (mounted) setBackends(await detectBackends());\n  })();\n  return () => { mounted = false; };\n}, [detectBackends, getStats]);"
  },
  "alternative": "如果问题持续，可在 ipc-handlers.ts 中确保 kg handler 在所有其他 handler 之前注册，或在 preload.cjs 中添加延迟初始化。"
}
```

**关键修复点**：
1. 添加 `try-catch` 捕获 "No handler registered" 错误
2. 使用指数退避重试机制等待 handler 注册完成
3. 使用 `mounted` flag 防止组件卸载后更新状态","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"fe6d01bd-01ad-4d74-9689-55fd614120e0","total_cost_usd":0.23859960000000005,"usage":{"input_tokens":39557,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":327662,"output_tokens":1442,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"MiniMax-M2.5":{"inputTokens":39557,"outputTokens":1442,"cacheReadInputTokens":327662,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.23859960000000005,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"2ce42c5b-7c3b-459c-9738-adf8eaab1326"}
